name: Sugared Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, milk and cinnamon in a saucepan.
2. Cook to 242°F (or "soft ball") stage.
3. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla and walnuts.
4. When the walnuts are well coated with syrup, spread out on wax paper to cool.
5. Break apart and store in jars.
6. Excellent for Christmas or as a "thank you" gift to someone.
